Intelligence Layer

The city is
a data network.
So is your fleet.

APEX monitors every data point across your managed aircraft — continuously, silently, without interruption. It doesn't just report what happened. It predicts what will.

"Every light below is a data point. APEX maps the invisible."

Platform Capabilities

Built from the left seat.
Deployed across the fleet.

aeroAI was founded by pilots and operators who understood one truth: the data has always been there. It just needed intelligence to interpret it.

01 — MONITOR
Fleet Intelligence Dashboard
Real-time visibility across every managed aircraft. Flight hours, cycle counts, anomaly flags, and predictive maintenance indicators — all in one command view.
02 — PREDICT
APEX Predictive Engine
APEX doesn't wait for problems to appear. It identifies patterns in flight data that precede incidents — giving operators a 72-hour advantage over unscheduled maintenance.
03 — ADVISE
Asset Management Advisory
From acquisition analysis to disposition strategy, our advisory layer combines AI-driven market intelligence with decades of operational experience.
04 — INTEGRATE
Multi-Source Data Sync
APEX ingests flight data from ADS-B, FDM systems, and maintenance logs. Every data source feeds a single source of truth. No fragmentation.
05 — REPORT
Automated Intelligence Reports
Fleet owners and lessors receive structured, APEX-authored intelligence briefings. Daily, weekly, or on-event. Always in plain language. Always actionable.
06 — SECURE
Enterprise Security Architecture
Fleet data is sensitive. aeroAI operates on SOC 2-aligned infrastructure with end-to-end encryption and role-based access control for every organization.
On the Ramp · N15VX
Above the Weather
Dubai · Global Reach
Above the Cloud Layer
Origin

The aviation industry is flying through
a data fog.
APEX clears it.

aeroAI was built in San Francisco by a pilot who spent decades in the left seat of commercial and business aircraft — and spent just as long frustrated by the gap between the data the aircraft generated and the intelligence operators actually received.


That gap is the company. Every hour in the air, every maintenance event observed, every fleet anomaly identified too late — those experiences became the algorithm.


SAN FRANCISCO — BUILT HERE. DEPLOYED GLOBALLY.

Bridgeway builds the wings.
APEX provides the brain.

San Francisco · Built Here · Deployed Everywhere

Brand Architecture

Two companies.
One ecosystem.

Bridgeway Aero Tech
Hardware & Infrastructure

The operational backbone. Bridgeway manages the physical side of aviation — maintenance, technical services, and the infrastructure that keeps aircraft flying. Trusted by operators, lessors, and financiers who need reliable partners on the ground.

×
aeroAI
Intelligence & Prediction

The intelligence layer. aeroAI transforms fleet data into predictive intelligence through APEX. Where Bridgeway knows the machine, aeroAI predicts what it will do next — connecting physical operations to the data insights that drive better decisions.
